arts.ttl: Bayern Munich head coach Vincent Kompany explains viral outburst from Burnley documentary
arts.sum: Now it’s a different viral video, from last season, when Kompany was at Burnley — and a documentary crew again was on hand to capture a tirade at Icelandic midfielder Jóhann Berg Guðmundsson. “This is actually the first time this year at Bayern that I don’t have a camera crew filming my entire season for a documentary.

arts.ttl: Arsenal 'suffered emphatic rejection' after enquiry over Bayern Munich star
arts.sum: Arsenal reportedly failed in their attempts to sign three players this summer before securing a last-minute deal for Raheem Sterling on transfer deadline day.

arts.ttl: Christoph Freund excited to see a “pain free” Leroy Sané at Bayern Munich
arts.sum: He had been dealing with said injury for the majority of the second half of last season for Bayern up through the Euros with Germany and he has been working on his recovery and return to full fitness ever since. Looking ahead, Bayern sporting director Christoph Freund expressed his delight and excitement at having a fit Sané back in the squad ahead of the Bundesliga clash at Holstein Kiel.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich puts RB Leipzig to the sword in Frauen-Bundesliga showcase
arts.sum: But Bayern pressure mounted, with near-misses at first before the Bavarians finally answered late in a rain-drenched half — Linda Dallman, cutting in from the right and firing a curler with her left, in what would prove to be just the first of a quickfire double. Bayern Munich notched a 6-2 Frauen-Bundesliga win on Friday over RB Leipzig in a match that, despite an early scare, was ultimately not close at all.

arts.ttl: Daniel Levy told there’s ‘nothing stopping’ Harry Kane from making Tottenham return
arts.sum: Harry Kane left Tottenham Hotspur in 2023 to join Bayern Munich and end a 19-year association with the club, but his an ex-Spurs star believes a return to north London could happen

arts.ttl: Saturday's Bundesliga predictions including Holstein Kiel vs. Bayern Munich
arts.sum: Sports Mole provides score predictions and previews for all of today's Bundesliga fixtures, including Holstein Kiel vs. Bayern Munich.

arts.ttl: Daily Schmankerl: Real Madrid, FC Barcelona to battle for Bayern Munich’s Jamal Musiala?; Manchester City to see roster fallout if Pep Guardiola leaves?; Newcastle, Arsenal eyeing Leroy Sané; Bayern, Real, PSG among teams eyeing William Saliba; and MORE!
arts.sum: Not only are English powers like Manchester City, Arsenal FC, and Liverpool FC already dreaming about what a Musiala transfer might look like, but both Real Madrid and FC Barcelona are reportedly pondering a future with the Germany international. As Bayern Munich works to get a new deal done with Jamal Musiala, the potential competition for him — should he actually hit the transfer market next summer — could be intense.

arts.ttl: Liverpool & Real Madrid linked - Could Jamal Musiala leave Bayern Munich next season?
arts.sum: Bayern Munich are under pressure to reach a number of necessary goals this season. First and foremost, new head coach Vincent Kompany must regain control in the Bundesliga and...

arts.ttl: Passive Income: Bayern Munich set to receive share of Marvin Cuni transfer funds
arts.sum: Earlier this week, Rubin Kazan had announced that they had officially completed the signing of former Bayern Munich youth team player Marvin Cuni. From the transfer, Bayern is set to receive roughly €1 million, which is about half of the fee Kazan paid to Frosinone to secure the signing of the 23-year-old (via @iMiaSanMia_GER ).

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich’s Dayot Upamecano explains that Vincent Kompany gives him “a lot of advice” as he looks to shake off rough start to season
arts.sum: This will no doubt help the Frenchman’s self-confidence ahead of his games for Bayern, starting with Holstein Kiel this weekend, as the Bavarian giants look to collect their fourth win from four games under new head coach Vincent Kompany. Bayern Munich ’s Dayot Upamecano was heavily criticized for his start to the Bundesliga season and was duly dropped from the France starting lineup for their game against Italy.
